explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 55 from a base nutrition score of 52. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: a true outlier for fruit fat quality
topPros.explanation: This behaves nothing like typical sweet fruit and that makes the category result exceptional.

topCons.title: calorie density is much higher than most fruits
topCons.explanation: Still useful, but it changes how casually you can throw it in.

topCons.title: sugar can climb fast
topCons.explanation: A lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.

topCons.title: satiety is not especially strong
topCons.explanation: Fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

closing.summary: Avocado has a genuinely strong overall case, especially a true outlier for fruit fat quality and easy to use as a whole food. the downsides are there, but calorie density is much higher than most fruits and sugar can climb fast do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.

Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.
Check that the final tier verdict feels editorially defensible.
nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.
